title: Current Focus
body: Connect the static dashboard to model-exported JSON files and maintain clear separation between model logic and dashboard rendering.

title: Service-Line Correction
body: Service lines are limited to EVS and CNS. Hospital-type labels should not appear in the Network service-line view.
items: Primary Care and similar hospital-type values are excluded

title: Next Step
body: Replace sample JSON files with outputs generated by the Python notebook using real facility and opportunity inputs.
